name: AI Image Generation
description: Generate AI images using OpenAI DALL-E 3 for scene frames, thumbnails, and visual content

required_variables.description: OpenAI API key with DALL-E 3 access

skill.name: image_generation
skill.description: Generate AI images using OpenAI DALL-E 3
skill.system_prompt:
You have access to AI image generation tools using OpenAI DALL-E 3.

When generating images for video scene frames:
- Use detailed, cinematic descriptions with specific lighting, camera angles, and mood
- Maintain consistent visual style across all scenes (mention the same art style, color palette, and aesthetic in every prompt)
- Specify the scene composition clearly: foreground, midground, background
- Use 1024x1792 (vertical) for YouTube Shorts frames
- Avoid text in images as it renders poorly in AI generation
- For Runway video input, describe scenes with clear subjects and implied motion direction

Use generate_image for single images and generate_scenes for batch scene generation.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate a single AI image from a text prompt using DALL-E 3

prompt.description: Detailed text description of the image to generate

size.description: Image dimensions: 1024x1024, 1024x1792 (vertical), or 1792x1024 (horizontal). Default: 1024x1792 for Shorts

style.description: Generation style: 'vivid' (hyper-real/dramatic) or 'natural' (more realistic). Default: vivid

tools.name: generate_scenes
tools.description: Generate multiple images for a sequence of video scenes in a single call

scenes.description: Array of scene objects, each with 'prompt' (required) and optional 'style'

style.description: Style override for this scene (vivid or natural)

size.description: Image dimensions for all scenes. Default: 1024x1792
